case_title: SHAOMEI LU VS. CHELSEA D. BEAUFORD

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-20-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-20-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE CONTINUED TO NEXT MONTH. TWO PAYMENTS OF $500.00 EACH PAYABLE ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH WITH PROGRESS REPORT ON THE 20TH OF THE EACH MONTH FOR 2 MORE MONTHS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-20-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SHAOMEI LU WITH COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER CONNIE CHEN. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CHELSEA D. BEAUFORD. DEFENDANT AGREES TO SEND PLAINTIFF CASHIER'S CHECK ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH. IF NO APPEARANCES, CONTINUE EACH MONTH UNTIL FEBRUARY 2017. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

ORDER CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 20, 2016 AT 10:00 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE CONTINUED TO NEXT MONTH. THREE PAYMENTS OF $500.00 EACH PAYABLE ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH WITH PROGRESS REPORT ON THE 20TH OF THE EACH MONTH FOR 3 MONTHS. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-21-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-23-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE THE CASE WILL DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. PLAINTIFF SHAOMEI LU IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHELSEA D. BEAUFORD IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. PURSUANT TO THE NOV-017-16 OCURT ORDER THE DEFENDANT AGREED TO PAY PLAINTIFF THREE PAYMENTS OF $500.00 PAYABLE ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH WITH A PROGRESS REPORT SCHEDULED FOR THE 20TH OF EACH MONT WITH THE FINAL PAYMENT DUE FEB-15-17. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE; SETTLED. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SHAMEI LU. NO APPEARANCE BY CHELSEA BEAUFORD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
